strengths: ~17 years of software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure demonstrates genuine breadth and adaptability
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling at re:cinq shows active engagement with emerging AI developer ecosystems
Founder of GISCollective and multiple open-source projects (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Vibe.dav) evidences an entrepreneurial, builder mindset within a larger career
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; holds only a BS in Computer Science, falling short of the preferred Master's/PhD qualification
No demonstrated recognized AI expertise — no publications, AI-product launches at scale, or external advisory/thought leadership on AI or cloud strategy
Career trajectory tops out at Staff/Senior Engineer level; no evidence of director-level IC scope, cross-org influence, or advising strategic enterprise customers

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI and platform builder experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, versatile engineer with a long track record of shipping across diverse stacks and a genuine entrepreneurial streak, but the role calls for a director-level individual contributor who is a recognized authority on AI strategy, capable of advising enterprise customers and shaping the future direction of cloud and AI products — a scope that his resume does not yet support. His recent pivot into AI-agent tooling is a meaningful signal, but it is contributor-level and nascent rather than the kind of demonstrated platform-scale AI expertise and external thought leadership the position explicitly requires.
